description: This file defines a React component for the dashboard layout in a frontend application. It includes navigation logic based on user roles, sidebar rendering (desktop and mobile), and a header with user actions such as logout. The component is used to provide a consistent shell around specific page content in a dashboard interface.

methods.name: getNavItems
methods.description: Generates navigation items filtered by user role, determining which pages are accessible to the current user.

methods.name: handleLogout
methods.description: Handles user logout process, including calling the logout API and redirecting to the login page.
